name: 10 Federal Self Storage Acquisition Co. 2
notes: Oversubscribed at $32M. 26 acquisitions, 7,500+ units across the Southeast. 13-asset partial exit reported Q1 2026.

name: 10 Federal Self Storage Acquisition Co. 3
notes: Raised from 128 investors. Bolt-on portfolio expansion including the Jan 2026 Arkansas 7-facility deal (2,730 units, 487,652 NRSF).

name: Opportunistic Offering (10FSSAC4)
notes: Q3 2024 first close $25M (led by Essentia Capital). Q2 2025 add-on $28M. Targeting $150M total. Ground-up Class-A multi-story focus. Funding 8 named development sites (Georgetown TX, Dripping Springs TX, Charlotte NC, Richmond Hill GA, Villa Rica GA, Temple GA, Lake Worth TX, plus pipeline). Backed by $100M First Horizon credit facility.
